publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 43-45. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest W. I laughed most heartily over the account of the kicking quadrupeds, &c, this morning. My mother's plans are again altered; & if I find them really fixed (as I believe them to be), I shall be back at Ockham on Saturday next. She is so pleased
with the University Arems Hotel, & the very fine pure air of the situation, that she means to stay here a week or two; & to have an Acheson over from Brampton.

There is an idea of my making a further tour with her again by & bye; but of this nothing is yet fixed; & I don't think it would be at any rate for the next fortnight. So would not the end of next week do

According to my present intentions, (but you know I am depending on a very uncertain person), I shall be in St James' Sqre on Friday Evening; & back at Ockham by dinner-time on Satdy. I have Lauzelle to see on Satdy morning [crossed out: &] or afternoon. Let me have a line in St James' Sqre to say what trains stop at Weybridge between 3 & 7 o'clock. Because the
carriage should meet me; & I have (remember) my maid to take back who is on holiday in Town, & some luggage.

I shall be in Town before 1/2 past six on Friday, so as to send you a line to fix the hour for the carriage on Satdy; if I only find your letter, as I hope. I can put in, you know, by a doublt stamp, till 1/2 past six.

peculiar in the air of this place. I never have been so well, & my Mother says she finds me quite altered since St Neots, where I looked very ill. My chilliness is diminished, my appetite & digestion most active & healthy, & I am able to diminish the number of pills I have to take.
I cannot conceive what it is. My mother also finds the place delightful & beneficial.-- I have
also quite lost my Asthma, or whatever it is. At least I have it but very slightly, & seldom.
I am much struck with the Power I seem to have over my mother's spirits & cheerfullness of mind.
